title: Closing Gong Commemorating Listing Of Tripple-Tranche Eurobonds
description: During the Closing Gong Ceremony to commemorate the listing of the Triple-Tranche USD4.00 billion Eurobonds, USD1.25 billion Eurobonds and the N250 Billion Sukuk on NGX.
html: During the Closing Gong Ceremony to commemorate the listing of the Triple-Tranche USD4.00 billion Eurobonds, USD1.25 billion Eurobonds and the N250 Billion Sukuk on NGX.
